run_proofs.name: hash_chain_integrity
run_proofs.claim: All step hash links are valid (tamper-evident chain)

run_proofs.name: all_steps_valid
run_proofs.claim: Every timestep satisfies all physics invariants

run_proofs.name: rank_stability

run_proofs.name: pcc_chain_integrity
